rules.rule: every OCR fragment MUST cite source_evidence_id, decomposition_id, region or page reference, and reviewer attribution.
OCR fragments MUST cite verbatim_sha256 of the recorded text; silent normalization is FORBIDDEN.
OCR fragments are append-only; in-place mutation is FORBIDDEN.
OCR corrections MUST cite prior_fragment_id; corrections without lineage are FORBIDDEN.
OCR corrections MUST be reviewer-attributed; autonomous OCR cleanup is FORBIDDEN.
OCR language detection / translation / normalization MUST be reviewer-declared; silent translation is FORBIDDEN.
OCR fragments cited by a candidate MUST exist; orphan OCR references BLOCK candidate approval.
